title: Upstart Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
text: Upstart Holdings delivered strong Q4 2025 and full-year 2025 results. Q4 2025 Revenue: $296.09 million, beating estimates by $7.53 million. EPS Normalized Actual at $0.50 (beating by $0.03) and EPS GAAP Actual at $0.17 (beating by $0.02). Full-Year 2025 Performance: Total revenue reached $1.04 billion, up 64% from 2024. Net income was $54 million with adjusted EBITDA of $230 million at a 22% margin. Originations and Volume: Transaction volume showed 1,497,149 loans originated in Q4, up 115% year-over-year. Auto and home originations each grew 5X in 2025 and accelerated even further in Q4. Strategic Achievements: The company successfully expanded its product portfolio with auto and home lending becoming increasingly significant contributors to originations. Multiple capital partnerships and securitizations were completed to support the growth in secured lending products. Forward Outlook: The company is positioned for continued growth with strong momentum in auto and home originations and expanding institutional partnerships.
